warning: The `requires-python` specifier (`~=3.11`) in `alexalemi-github-io` uses the tilde specifier (`~=`) without a patch version. This will be interpreted as `>=3.11, <4`. Did you mean `~=3.11.0` to constrain the version as `>=3.11.0, <3.12`? We recommend only using the tilde specifier with a patch version to avoid ambiguity.
